message: Jake
Guy
Kristy
is she not home?
I wonder if she went somewhere.
She's not here.
Where could she have gone?
Hey.
Oh,
you were here.
Yeah, I was just having a meeting.
About the wedding?
Oh, right. But we're getting caught up in location and all those little details.
It's such a hassle, this kind of thing.
View
Talk
Listen
Think
System
Around the area
About Ginny
About Jennifer
About Cindy
About her
About　them
Save
End the game
and
are standing in front of me. It's not like anyone's offering me a seat; it feels like I'm an intruder.
It feels cramped in this room with three people here. This room is
not suitable for someone with my level of income.
The room itself seems unchanged.
I feel misplaced in their happy atmosphere.
They look so healthy that it’s hard to believe they were just recently imprisoned. The only difference is that their skin seems a bit paler, maybe?
They are almost as healthy as they were before being imprisoned.
They have a cool smile that seems to say they have no worries at all. Do they really have no worries?
At least from their expression, they appear happy.
It seems they’ve gained a bit of weight compared to when they were missing. It’s hard to believe there were concerns about their sanity at one point.
Just by them being back, look at this change; what was my effort for?
I loved them sincerely.
They say they can marry, so there’s no way they look unhappy.
At this rate, we should be back to how we were before soon.
Probably.
What’s up, did something urgent come up?
Nah, it’s not like I have anything urgent.
What’s with the hesitation?
If you’ve got something to say, you might as well just say it. First off, there’s no need for any weird restraint between us.
You’re overthinking a lot of things.
Well, I’ve been meeting various women because of you. It’s not like I’m doing anything bad, alright?
I’ll just play the observer here.
So, just now,
I was talking with her,
and we were thinking of having you as a witness and getting married at some small church.
Do you think I could be useful?
Oh, I think that person is perfect to be our two witnesses.
So, you think I'm a gruesome murderer?
No, it's not like that, but...
But in the end, you are doubting me, right? It's very shocking, it hurts my heart.
Well, well, it's alright, you two,
There's no way I could kill someone,
after all, I have no ill intent.
But,
you think I’m the kind of woman who would slice and kill someone.
Can you stop already? So, um,
I’m going on a little trip starting next week.
Are you going alone again?
No, this time I'm going with
someone. Well,
yeah.
Oh, that’s great. Be careful on your trip.
I don’t need to hear that from you.
Sorry.
Well, it's a busy day today, so come again later.
Ah, okay. Have fun on your trip.
Thanks.
I felt a lingering unease about his attitude, but I won't ask anything now.
However,
the suspicion towards him still hadn't faded.
What’s up? Don’t hold back, just say it.
I really have something I want to confirm with you. Whether it's good for you or not.
Even if it’s something bad for me.
If you're concerned, it’s okay. Ask me anything.
Do you have something to say? Just tell me clearly, what happened?
You know a woman named Ginny who works in the escort service, right?
Just stay quiet, I'm.
I'm asking you.
If you're asking something like that, you must have looked into it. The answer is yes.
Wasn't it you who was with her until the very end when she went missing?
It's true that I called you out using . But I don’t know if I was the last to see her.
I just wanted to know about her relationship with .
That's why I went to see her a few times.
So, did you know?
Isn't it strange that you didn't?
Do you know where Ginny is and what she's up to?
Well, I don't even want to know where she is and what she's doing. But it's fine, she's happy now.
If you think I did something to her, that's a mistake.
I heard from the director that you went to see Jennifer.
I visited Jennifer, but I couldn't meet her. Besides, it's all in the past now, it's fine.
Did you go to see her about...?
No, not really.
But it's okay, all of that is over now.
She barely spoke during the party.
If we'd gotten a little closer, I might've been able to brag about my friend.
If it’s not that reason, then why her?
Persistent men are disliked, you know.
Yeah, she does kinda resemble that guy.
That guy?
Melissa, who was trying to reform you when you were a junkie.
Oh right, Melissa. I just remember her name now. I realized it during that first party in Boston.
Let’s stop talking about Melissa.
Are you still hung up on that? That was an accident.
You didn't kill her.
In any case, there's nothing more to say about Jennifer. If something happened, that's between her and me.
Did you go to see Cindy because of that article?
Yeah, that's right.
I went to see if you liked her. I heard you had a girlfriend already?
You didn’t see Tim?
At that time, it was just Cindy. I really had a hard time looking for her. It was really tough.
That girl was cute, but her personality seemed a bit difficult, huh. I never thought she would be killed.
She is Meryl's daughter. So Meryl...
Ah, I see. At the party, I didn’t know what was happening.
About Cindy...
I don't intend to blame her.
If he finds out about the actions taken during his absence...
the happy relationship between the two right in front of me might crumble.
But still, if I don't listen to this now...
At one point,
why did he suddenly decide to get married when he was trying to break off the engagement?
What kind of exchanges happened between them?
Wasn’t their relationship already broken once?
If I keep prying, I might end up hated by them.
I need to ask about the reason for visiting Ginny, Cindy, and Jennifer.
He might be innocent. However, if there’s even a bit of doubt, I can't just ignore it.
He had a relationship with Ginny and was rumored with Cindy. There might be other women too. Even so,
are you going to marry her?
Maybe it's better to just genuinely congratulate them now.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
